About GreGo

The Guy Who Shows Up
When Everyone Else Doesn't.

Gregory built GreGo on one simple promise: if you call, he comes.

Owner Operated — Gregory

Most tow services are a gamble. You call, you wait, and you wonder if anyone's actually coming. Gregory is different.

He answers late Friday nights when other companies let it go to voicemail. He shows up fast when families are stranded with kids in the car. He goes out of his way — because that's just how he operates.

Whether you need a quick local tow, a long-distance haul, a motorcycle moved to storage, or someone to get you safely off a dark highway, Gregory handles it personally. No runaround. No hidden fees. Just honest help when you need it most.

Serving Dallas/Fort Worth & surrounding areas
Available 24 hours, 7 days — including holidays
Transparent, fair pricing on every job
Local, owner-operated — not a call center
What We Do

One Call. Every
Situation Covered.

From a flat tire at midnight to a long-distance haul across Texas — GreGo handles it all.

🚨

24-Hour Emergency Towing

Stranded at any hour? Gregory picks up. Day, night, weekend, or holiday — he's on call when you need him most.

🚗

Local Towing

Need a tow across town? Fast, careful, and priced fairly. Gregory treats every vehicle like it's his own.

🗺️

Long-Distance Towing

Broke down out of state or need a vehicle hauled across Texas? GreGo handles long hauls with the same care as a local run.

🏍️

Motorcycle Towing

Bikes need special handling. Gregory does it right — even for motorcycles that haven't moved in years.

🔧

Roadside Assistance

Flat tire, dead battery, locked out? Call before you call a tow — Gregory may be able to get you rolling right there.

🚙

Flatbed Towing

Low-clearance vehicles, luxury cars, anything that shouldn't be dragged — loaded safely and transported with care.

🌙

After-Hours & Holiday Service

When the big chain companies are closed or not answering — Gregory is. No voicemail, no runaround.

🔩

Auto Shop Services

Beyond towing, GreGo handles repairs and general auto work. Call Gregory and ask what he can do for your vehicle.

Our Work

Real Jobs.

Why GreGo

Why DFW Calls
GreGo First.

Three things that set Gregory apart from every other tow service in the area.

01

Always Available

Gregory answers when other companies don't. Late nights, weekends, holidays — if you're stranded, he picks up the phone. Every time.

02

Lightning-Fast Response

Customers consistently report arrival in minutes, not hours. When you're stuck on the side of the road, every minute matters — Gregory knows that.

03

Genuinely Kind

From out-of-state families to first-time callers, every customer is treated like a neighbor in need — not just another job on the list.

Real Reviews

Real People.
Real Emergencies.

★★★★★

FAQ

Common Questions.

Everything you need to know before you call.

Response times vary by location, but many customers report Gregory arriving within minutes of their call. He prioritizes emergency situations and after-hours calls above all else.
Yes. Gregory is personally on call around the clock — including late nights, weekends, and holidays. If you're stranded, call 214-417-6828 and he will answer.
Yes. Gregory has experience towing bikes, including motorcycles that have been sitting in storage for years. He handles every vehicle with extra care.
Pricing is fair and transparent — multiple customers have specifically called out GreGo's affordability. Call 214-417-6828 for a quick, honest quote with no surprises.
Yes. GreGo handles long hauls, including out-of-state tows. Call to discuss your route and get a straightforward quote.
GreGo primarily serves Dallas/Fort Worth and surrounding areas. For long-distance jobs, call Gregory directly and he'll let you know.
